V9.NNR-001: Schema closure: every identifier referenced is defined exactly once with type/nullability/default/validation/index/ownership/migration
V9.NNR-002: Only Control service may authorize any side effect. Brain PROPOSES, never executes
V9.NNR-003: Two-phase simulate->commit for every write-capable tool
V9.NNR-004: RLS enabled on ALL tables with workspace_id scoping via app.workspace_id
V9.NNR-005: Deterministic reasoning: temperature=0, top_p=1, lexical tool ordering
V9.NNR-006: All async operations run on Temporal. No goroutines, no cron, no background threads
V9.NNR-007: All event emissions via transactional outbox pattern
V9.NNR-009: Deterministic jitter: jitter_ms = fnv1a_hash(workflow_run_id + attempt) % max_jitter

V9.1.NNR-V91-001: All V9.1 tables additive; no V9 table modifications
V9.1.NNR-V91-002: Lesson activation requires explicit operator confirmation
V9.1.NNR-V91-003: Trust promotion requires trust_score>=0.85 AND success_count_30d>=20
V9.1.NNR-V91-004: AI self-modification of workspace_personas/behavior_policies/learning_config DENY by default

V9.2.NNR-V92-001: Guardrails runtime wraps every LLM call. No unguarded model invocation
V9.2.NNR-V92-002: Context budget mandatory for every LLM request. No unbounded context assembly
V9.2.NNR-V92-003: RAG retrievals logged with latency, relevance scores, chunk provenance
V9.2.NNR-V92-004: Feature flags gate all V9.2 capabilities
V9.2.NNR-V92-005: Multi-turn sessions expire after configurable idle timeout
V9.2.NNR-V92-006: Temporal reasoning uses UTC internally; user-facing times via workspace timezone
V9.2.NNR-V92-007: Admin backend requires AdminJWT. No admin operation without auth + audit
V9.2.NNR-V92-009: Tool health scores computed continuously. Auto-quarantine non-overridable without admin
V9.2.NNR-V92-010: Event schema changes pass compatibility check before deploy
V9.2.NNR-V92-011: CRDT vector clocks mandatory for multi-device workspace memory writes
V9.2.NNR-V92-012: All V9.2 tables workspace-scoped with RLS. No exceptions

V10.NNR-V10-001: V9 architectural patterns WIN all conflicts between source documents
V10.NNR-V10-002: All cost values stored as NUMERIC(18,8) in USD
V10.NNR-V10-003: All new tables: UUIDv7 PKs, workspace_id RLS scope, forward-only migrations

V10.1.NNR-101: V10 architectural patterns authoritative. Extends, never modifies
V10.1.NNR-102: All new tables: UUIDv7 PKs, workspace_id RLS, migration 004_brevio_v101_admin_intelligence.sql
V10.1.NNR-103: Cost values NUMERIC(18,8) USD. Integer cents never used for LLM costs
V10.1.NNR-104: Cost writes async via outbox. 0ms latency added to hot path
V10.1.NNR-105: All dashboards read from materialized views, never raw tables

V10.4.NNR-V104-001: Every outbound call requires explicit user approval

critical_tables.name: workspaces
critical_tables.purpose: Workspace-scoped RLS mandatory on ALL tables

critical_tables.name: tool_executions
critical_tables.purpose: Two-phase commit log (simulate+commit rows for every tool call)

critical_tables.name: trust_receipts
critical_tables.purpose: Cryptographic receipt for every committed tool execution

critical_tables.name: audit_log_entries
critical_tables.purpose: Append-only, hash-chain HMAC. DB trigger prevents UPDATE/DELETE

critical_tables.name: outbox_items
critical_tables.purpose: Transactional outbox for all event emissions

critical_tables.name: prompt_versions
critical_tables.purpose: All prompts versioned; shadow eval mandatory before promotion

critical_tables.name: key_versions
critical_tables.purpose: KMS key rotation tracking; dual-key read window >=10 min

critical_tables.name: skills_registry
critical_tables.purpose: 153 skills with deployment mode, retry policy, circuit breaker config

critical_tables.name: memory_items
critical_tables.purpose: Five-modality memory: episodic, semantic, procedural, goal-oriented, relational

critical_tables.name: workspace_personas
critical_tables.purpose: Agent personality and communication style config

critical_tables.name: knowledge_files
critical_tables.purpose: SOUL.md and USER.md behavioral knowledge files

tables.name: learned_lessons
tables.purpose: Activated rules derived from feedback, requires operator confirmation

tables.name: self_modification_policies
tables.purpose: DENY by default for AI self-modification

tables.name: project_templates
tables.purpose: Template generation from repo pattern analysis

context_budgets.constraints: UNIQUE(workspace_id, model_tier). Percentages must sum to 100.00

wallet_accounts.purpose: Per-workspace spending wallet for tool usage

agent_federations.privacy_invariant: Raw memory items and conversation content CANNOT cross federation boundary

fast_path_precomputed.purpose: Precomputed answers for high-confidence pattern matches (<500ms)

new_tables.name: tool_mttr_tracking
new_tables.purpose: Mean time to recovery per tool

cognitive_modules: COG-03: Self-Consistency Sampling (multiple reasoning paths, majority vote)
COG-04: Belief State Tracking (probabilistic beliefs under uncertainty)
COG-06: Theory of Mind (modeling user knowledge state)
COG-09: Constitutional Preference Learning (learning from preferences not just corrections)
COG-11: Explanation Generation (causal explanations for actions)
COG-12: Attention Allocation (dynamic focus on most relevant context)

eq_state_enum: neutral, positive, stressed, frustrated, confused, rushed

V9.name: ProvisioningWorkflow
V9.note: Super-workflow with compensation in reverse order

V10.3.name: System1HeuristicLearning
V10.3.note: Train System 1 heuristics from execution traces

V10.4.name: OutboundCallWorkflow
V10.4.note: VAPI.ai call lifecycle with approval gate

V9_core: ExecutionGate: allow/deny based on autonomy, domain, risk_level, role, rate-limit, budget, content firewall
Provisioning: denied_server_ids -> allowed_server_ids -> risk_level -> budget -> operator review
Self-modification: AI modifying workspace_personas/behavior_policies/learning_config -> DENY or require_approval
No user can execute disabled skill
No user can exceed monthly LLM budget without admin override
No user can access another user's OAuth tokens
No skill executes when circuit breaker OPEN
No external API call outside Temporal Activity
No PII logged in plaintext after 30-day retention
V9.2_rules: Context Budget Enforcement: DENY LLM call without budget allocation
RAG Retrieval Rate Limit: DENY >50 retrievals/workspace/hour
Session Expiry Gate: DENY tool call referencing expired session
Temporal Constraint Violation: DENY scheduling violating hard constraint (priority>=80)
Guardrail Block Override: DENY bypass without admin approval
Tool Quarantine Gate: DENY call to quarantined tool, route to fallback
Feature Flag Gate: DENY action behind disabled flag
Model Tier Cap: DENY exceeding max_tier, downgrade
ReAct Step Limit: TERMINATE at max_steps, return partial results
PII Encryption Gate: DENY PII write without encryption
MCP Sandbox Enforcement: DENY sandbox violation
DSR SLA Warning: ESCALATE DSR within 5 days of deadline
Event Schema Validation: DENY invalid schema emission
Cache Write Size Limit: DENY >1MB cache entry
Conflict Resolution Manual: PAUSE on failed CRDT merge
Streaming First Byte SLA: WARN on first_byte breach, send ack immediately
Admin Action Audit: ALLOW with mandatory audit_log_entry
Compliance Evidence Integrity: DENY upload without SHA-256 hash
V10_additions: Federation: deny raw memory/conversation crossing federation boundary
Wallet: allow_purchase if balance >= amount AND daily/monthly limits not exceeded
Agent Kill Switch: deny all actions for user with active kill switch
openclaw_additions: Hook execution policy: plugin enabled + registration enabled + valid hook point
DM access policy: sender on allowlist OR explicit open mode ack
Token budget policy: deny if monthly LLM budget exhausted

core_services.name: brevio-control
responsibilities: ExecutionGate PDP (OPA eval per tool call)

core_services.name: brevio-executor
responsibilities: Temporal activity host only (no direct API)

additional_services.name: brevio-edge-agent
responsibilities: macOS Launch Agent with mTLS + WebSocket

infrastructure_services: Redis 7 (cache, feature flag evaluation, session state)
ChromaDB (optional vector store for addendum features)

core_prompts.v10_2_update: Multi-intent output: intents:Intent[] with compound_request_detected flag

core_prompts.constraints: max 10 tasks, max depth 5, acyclic validation

database.rls: Mandatory on all tables via app.workspace_id

infrastructure.queues: SQS FIFO + Standard with DLQs per service
infrastructure.waf: AWS WAF (OWASP top-10, rate rules, admin IP allowlist)

security_groups.sg-eks: Inbound 8080 from sg-alb and sg-eks, Outbound to sg-rds/sg-redis/NAT

stages: Stage 1: Welcome - first message, personality establishment
Stage 2: Discovery - 5 questions to build USER.md profile
Stage 3: Connect Services - OAuth for Gmail, Calendar, Outlook, Slack
Stage 4: Preference Calibration - proactive frequency, approval format
Stage 5: First Value Moment - immediate inbox triage before user asks
Stage 6: Wrap Up - daily briefing schedule, open invitation

approval_system.timeout_handling: One reminder, then drop with notification

autonomy_levels.low: ask for big things, do small stuff

proactive_intelligence.conflict_detection: Spot calendar clashes with suggested fixes
proactive_intelligence.forgotten_followups: Detect emails without reply after N days
proactive_intelligence.weather_travel: Surface weather/traffic for upcoming meetings with travel

correction_handling.misunderstanding: Rephrase with clarifying question, never defensive
correction_handling.factual_error: Own it, correct immediately, offer next step
correction_handling.repeated_mistake: Acknowledge pattern, offer to make a rule
correction_handling.undo: Move fast, confirm done, offer prevention

recurring_tasks.modification: Confirm what changes, what stays same
recurring_tasks.pausing: Pause vs delete distinction, auto-resume option

learning_loop.correction_to_rule: Every 'stop doing X' becomes potential permanent rule
learning_loop.lesson_proposal: Agent spots pattern, proposes rule with edit/confirm/reject
learning_loop.lesson_adjustment: User can tweak proposed rule before confirming

billing_and_plans.trial: Free trial with usage tracking and 3-day warning
billing_and_plans.plan_limits: Monthly usage cap with upgrade or wait options

re_authentication.single_service_expired: Plain language explanation with reconnect link
re_authentication.mid_task_expiry: Explain what was interrupted, confirm email NOT sent, offer retry

service_outages.single_service_down: Specific service named, workaround offered, monitoring communicated
service_outages.outage_resolved: Close the loop with catch-up triage

outbound_calls.approval: Explicit user approval required for every call

consumer_delight_features.F01_multi_bubble_delivery: Responses split into 2-3 paced chat bubbles with typing indicators
consumer_delight_features.F02_send_button_pulse: Haptic-equivalent blue glow animation on message arrival
consumer_delight_features.F03_scenario_starter_chips: 3 tappable scenarios on splash (Morning briefing, Inbox triage, Fix a conflict)
consumer_delight_features.F04_name_personalization: Detects user name from first message, weaves into responses naturally

browser_automation.stealth_sessions: Playwright with proxy rotation for booking sites

welcome.copy_principle: Hook fast. No feature lists, just personality and a single ask

questions: What eats most of your time? (email/scheduling/research/tasks/all)
One thing that would prove value?

oauth_connect.copy_principle: Frame OAuth as enabling their goal, not technical step. Always offer skip

calibration.copy_principle: Only ask what changes behavior. 2 questions max

first_value.action: Inbox triage before user asks (14 emails sorted: 3 urgent, 7 FYI, 4 noise)
first_value.copy_principle: Most important moment. Show output before asking for input

persona_guidelines.tone: Warm, confident, concise. Never robotic or sycophantic
persona_guidelines.length: 2-4 sentences max unless showing a draft or list
persona_guidelines.formatting: *bold* for key data, numbered emoji for choices, max 2 emoji per message
principles: Always offer a way forward AND a way out
Show exactly what will happen before it happens
One reminder then let it go
Never say 'rate limit' or technical terms
Frame permissions as features unlocked, not errors
When user says 'just do it', do it. Don't confirm the confirmation

cryptographic_controls.approval_tokens: HMAC-SHA256 signed, CRITICAL TTL=30s, ELEVATED TTL=5min, nonce-unique
cryptographic_controls.webhook_signatures: HMAC-SHA256 timing-safe compare, replay protection nonce TTL=600s
cryptographic_controls.audit_log_integrity: Hash chain HMAC, append-only DB triggers, separate DB role
cryptographic_controls.artifact_verification: Ed25519 on image digests, SBOM + vulnerability scan required

pii_protection.redaction: Guardrails PII redaction before external model calls

mcp_sandboxing.resource_limits: CPU, memory, execution time per profile

mandatory_blocking_gates_in_order: 12. production deploy gates (staging smoke -> canary 10% -> SLO watch -> promote)

V9: RB-003: Incident response (P1-P4 severity, war room, RCA)
RB-004: Key rotation (KMS, Secrets Manager, OAuth re-encryption)
RB-005: Scaling (HPA, Cluster Autoscaler, RDS, Redis)
RB-006: Database recovery (snapshot restore + forward migration)
RB-007: Circuit breaker override (manual OPEN/CLOSE + recovery)
RB-009: Eval degradation response (shadow eval, rollback)

load_shedding_tiers.D3: Disable non-critical skills, maintain core messaging
load_shedding_tiers.D5: Minimal read-only: messaging, auth, audit only
